# tenableio_tag_category (Resource)

Manages a tag category in Tenable.io.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Create a tag category for organizing assets by environment
resource "tenableio_tag_category" "environment" {
  name        = "Environment"
  description = "Deployment environment classification"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the tag category (max 127 characters).

### Optional

- `description` (String) The description of the tag category (max 3000 characters).

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String)
- `created_by` (String)
- `updated_at` (String)
- `updated_by` (String)
- `uuid` (String) The UUID of the tag category.
